title: ACME Corp. (ACME) deep dive
description: Single-name equity tear-sheet: price + volume, earnings vs consensus, analyst ratings, beta regression, valuation vs 5Y range, return distribution.

tabs.label: Price & volume
tabs.description: Daily OHLC with the 60D KPI ribbon.

popup.title: Close price
popup.body:
### Definition

**Close** is the last printed trade on the primary listing exchange for the current trading session.

### Data sourcing

- Feed: *GS Market Data* (equities)
- Latency: roughly 100ms intraday, snapshot at session close
- Adjustments: cash dividends and splits are applied retroactively

### Related

See the [price history chart](#price_chart) below and the full OHLC candle detail in the ECharts tooltip.

tabs.label: Fundamentals
tabs.description: Quarterly EPS actuals vs consensus and analyst rating distribution.

rows.content:
### Thesis

ACME has beaten consensus EPS in 7 of the last 9 quarters, with the magnitude of beat widening on services revenue. Sell-side skew remains bullish (40 Buy+ vs 4 Sell-). Near-term catalyst: Q1 print in 3 weeks.
